---
title: "What Taiwan Can Teach the World on Fighting Coronavirus"
description: "Be scientific, be proactive, be transparent, be decisive, be cooperative, and be empathetic."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-03-12"
categories: [society, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![What Taiwan can teach the world on fighting the coronavirus. Image from [NBC News](https://www.nbcnews.com/health/health-news/what-taiwan-can-teach-world-fighting-coronavirus-n1153826).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Be scientific, be proactive, be transparent, be decisive, be cooperative, and be empathetic.

<https://lnkd.in/gcphy6N>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_what-taiwan-can-teach-the-world-on-fighting-activity-6643698542806466561-B_-c).*
